created.description: Timestamp when the Okta managed user account was created

description.description: The description of the Okta managed user account

email.description: The email address associated with the Okta user. This parameter is read-only, and it is derived from the Okta user profile.

id.description: The UUID of the Okta managed user account

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the Okta managed user account was last updated

name.description: The user-defined name for the Okta managed user account

oktaUserId.description: The ID of the Okta user being managed as a service account

ownerGroupIds.description: A list of IDs of the Okta groups who own the Okta managed user account

ownerUserIds.description: A list of IDs of the Okta users who own the Okta managed user account

status.description: Describes the current status of a service account

statusDetail.description: Describes the detailed status of a service account

username.description: The username associated with the Okta user. This parameter is read-only, and it is derived from the Okta user profile.
